query: Alien Romulus sequel new director hired confirmed name

{"query":"Alien Romulus sequel new director hired confirmed name","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1311,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/movies/movie-news/alien-romulus-sequel-fede-alvarez-1236362496/","title":"Alien: Romulus Sequel Will Not Be DIrected by Fede Alvarez","content":"But now the filmmaker has revealed he will not be behind the camera but rather is on the hunt for a new director to take over the franchise that stars Cailee Spaeny."},{"url":"https://www.yahoo.com/entertainment/movies/articles/alien-romulus-sequel-possibly-finds-182701247.html","title":"Alien: Romulus Sequel Possibly Finds Its Director — Report","content":"Michael Sarnoski is being considered to direct the sequel to the 2024 movie Alien: Romulus, after Fede Alvarez announced he wouldn’t be returning as director.
Alien: Romulus, directed by Fede Alvarez, was a box office success, making around $350 million globally and over $100 million domestically.
According to a recent report, The Death of Robin Hood director is being eyed to take over as the director of the Alien: Romulus sequel.
He is also known for his work on projects like A Quiet Place: Day One and Pig.
Nexus Point News states that some sources have confirmed that Michael Sarnoski is the potential candidate to take over the job after Fede Álvarez.
While speaking to TooFab in September 2025, Álvarez conveyed, "We just finished the script, actually, for a sequel for 'Romulus.' But I'm going to pass the torch on this one as director.
Additionally, Disney's 20th Century Fox President of Production, Steve Asbell, announced in October 2024 that the sequel was in the works.
He told The Hollywood Reporter that they were "working on a sequel idea now.""},{"url":"https://nexuspointnews.com/exclusive-michael-sarnoski-eyed-to-direct-the-alien-romulus-sequel/","title":"EXCLUSIVE: Michael Sarnoski Eyed to Direct the ‘Alien: Romulus’ Sequel","content":"EXCLUSIVE: Michael Sarnoski (A Quiet Place: Day One) is being considered to direct the highly anticipated sequel to Alien: Romulus, Nexus Point News has learned.
Sources indicate that Sarnoski is currently the preferred candidate for the job.
The potential choice is not surprising given the success of A Quiet Place: Day One, which also centered on a terrifying alien invasion.
At the same time, FX’s Alien: Earth series from Noah Hawley received a positive reception and was quickly renewed for a second season.
Michael Sarnoski is best known for the acclaimed drama Pig, starring Nicolas Cage, in addition to A Quiet Place: Day One.
His next film, The Death of Robin Hood, is scheduled to release in theaters later this year.
Sarnoski is also attached to direct the upcoming film adaptation of the video game Death Stranding."},{"url":"https://variety.com/2025/film/news/alien-romulus-sequel-fede-alvarez-not-returning-1236509609/","title":"'Alien Romulus' Sequel: Director Fede Alvarez Not Returning","content":"Speaking to TooFab, Alvarez said he will stay on as a producer for the “Alien: Romulus” sequel, but he and franchise creator Ridley Scott will search for a new director.
“I’m going to produce it, with Ridley Scott.
We’re going to produce it together and we’re right now trying to find a new filmmaker to come in.”
Right now, “Alien” has taken over TV with Noah Hawley’s FX/Hulu series “Alien: Earth,” a prequel taking place in the years before the original “Alien.”"},{"url":"https://www.ign.com/articles/alien-romulus-director-fede-alvarez-will-produce-but-not-direct-the-sequel","title":"Alien: Romulus Director Fede Alvarez Will Produce But Not Direct the Sequel - IGN","content":"Fede Alvarez will not direct the sequel to his hit 2024 film Alien: Romulus.
"But we wrote the story because we really love what we started with Romulus and we want to continue the story.
Cailee Spaeny and David Jonsson are expected to reprise their respective roles from Alien: Romulus for the sequel, which will be released by 20th Century Studios."}]}

It is the seventh installment in the *Alien* film series \"Alien (franchise)\"), set between the events of *Alien \"Alien (film)\")* (1979) and *Aliens \"Aliens (film)\")* (1986). *Alien: Romulus* premiered in Los Angeles on August 12, 2024, and was theatrically released in the United States by 20th Century Studios on August 16.","score":0.6811549,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":0.73,"request_id":"916d1601-d8e0-4481-9abb-74d9e5e83837"}
